MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANTS WILLIAM DRYPOLCHER, TRUDY DRYPOLCHER AND JAMES HOLLOWAY, D.P.P.M., INC. DBA ZEPHYR REAL ESTATE'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AS TO ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPERT COSTS, BUT OTHERWISE DENIED. PLAINTIFF PLEADS FACTS AGAINST THESE DEFENDANTS SUFFICIENT TO SUPPORT A CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6 (C). Opposing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Denise L. Doucette, CSR # 5963 =301/PJB
